home.title:
Didap.
Ideas built to last.
home.intro: A digital studio crafting brand identities, interactive experiences and bespoke products for people who don't settle for the obvious.
home.team_intro: Different backgrounds, one small and stubborn crew.

work.title: PROd by Didap
work.intro: Products we design, build and ship on our own. For design, for cities, for markets.

clients.title: Our partners
clients.intro: Clients and strategic partners we build alongside, working on products and long-term collaborations.

about.title: Didap, in two lines.
about.intro: We're a small, independent, stubborn studio.
about.body_1: We sit at the intersection of design and technology to build digital products that feel handcrafted.
about.body_2: Every project is a chance to learn something new — and to never repeat ourselves.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.intro: If you have a project in mind, write to us. We answer everyone — even just to say no.
contact.info_scope: We work on bespoke products, native apps, internal SaaS and management platforms, and websites — plus subsidised-finance consulting together with our partner The Qube.
